    1. setIsHorizontal(boolean)

Interface HardwareSlider

All Superinterfaces:
AbsoluteHardwareControl, ContinuousHardwareControl<AbsoluteHardwareControlBinding>, HardwareBindingSource<AbsoluteHardwareControlBinding>, HardwareControl, HardwareElement
public interface HardwareSlider extends AbsoluteHardwareControl
Represents a physical hardware button on a controller
Since:
API version 10

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    setIsHorizontal(boolean isHorizontal)
    Indicates if this slider is horizontal rather than vertical.
